_governance: APPROVED disclaimer/guardrail strings ONLY. Jeremy signs off on every entry. The pipeline NEVER auto-generates or auto-adds a disclaimer — the packet only SELECTS from this file. An entity present here with an EMPTY approved array means 'governed, requires a disclaimer, none approved yet' → the packet FAILS CLOSED (emits a HOLD banner and flags Jeremy instead of handing Ezekiel un-disclaimed copy).
